parameters.jsonBody: [{"name": "link", "description": "Link your Discord and Telegram accounts (or redeem a code from Telegram)", "type": 1, "options": [{"name": "code", "description": "Verification code from Telegram", "type": 3, "required": false}]}, {"name": "unlink", "description": "Unlink your Discord and Telegram accounts", "type": 1}, {"name": "profile", "description": "Update your display name", "type": 1, "options": [{"name": "name", "description": "Your new display name", "type": 3, "required": true}]}, {"name": "status", "description": "View your linked accounts and display name", "type": 1}, {"name": "admin-link", "description": "Force-link a Discord account to a Telegram account (admin only)", "type": 1, "options": [{"name": "discord_id", "description": "Discord user to link", "type": 6, "required": true}, {"name": "telegram_id", "description": "Telegram user ID to link", "type": 3, "required": true}]}, {"name": "admin-unlink", "description": "Force-unlink a platform account from its unified identity (admin only)", "type": 1, "options": [{"name": "platform", "description": "Platform to unlink from", "type": 3, "required": true, "choices": [{"name": "Discord", "value": "discord"}, {"name": "Telegram", "value": "telegram"}]}, {"name": "discord_user", "description": "Discord user to unlink (Discord only)", "type": 6, "required": false}, {"name": "id", "description": "User ID string (Telegram only, or Discord fallback)", "type": 3, "required": false}]}, {"name": "aerys-recall", "description": "See what Aerys remembers about you", "type": 1}, {"name": "aerys-pin", "description": "Lock a memory so Aerys won't overwrite it", "type": 1, "options": [{"name": "fact", "description": "Search for the memory to lock", "type": 3, "required": true}]}, {"name": "aerys-forget", "description": "Ask Aerys to forget a specific memory", "type": 1, "options": [{"name": "fact", "description": "Search for the memory to forget", "type": 3, "required": true}]}, {"name": "aerys-correct", "description": "Correct a memory Aerys has about you", "type": 1, "options": [{"name": "fact", "description": "Search for the memory to correct", "type": 3, "required": true}, {"name": "value", "description": "The correct value", "type": 3, "required": true}]}, {"name": "aerys-tell", "description": "Tell Aerys something about yourself to remember", "type": 1, "options": [{"name": "fact", "description": "What should Aerys remember?", "type": 3, "required": true}]}]
